description: Letter opening, fragmentary, from Natan b. Avraham to Shelomo b. Natan (Natanel ?), Fustat, approximately 1040. The main body was probably in Judaeo-Arabic. Verso: only the letters רשל in Hebrew script (marked as an abbreviation). (Information from CUDL)
description_he: שבר פתיחת מכתב מנתן בן אברהם לשלמה בן נתן (נתנאל?), פוסטאט, כ-1040.
